{"id": "f2c85698d5325bde853dedb8de737480", "ts": "1775759361.770826", "text": "I checked a few recent AP items, and the biggest time sink is still missing backup. For example, the Bridgefield invoice VEN-019-583136 is still pending approval, and the review note trail is inconsistent. If we standardize the checklist, we should also standardize the naming for support docs so the reviewer doesn't have to hunt around.", "type": "message", "subtype": null, "user_id": "persona_013", "channel_id": "C010", "created_at": "2026-04-09T18:29:21+00:00", "files_json": "[]", "reply_count": 0, "latest_reply": null, "client_msg_id": null, "reactions_json": "[]", "attachments_json": "[]", "thread_parent_id": "92f48647299a552092918bd2db79889a", "thread_ts_legacy": "1775759161.433334", "reply_users_count": 0, "is_activity_message": false}

{"id": "f799658892cc5b6fa3f25348310e7535", "ts": "1775759470.784155", "text": "The standard should be simple enough to apply consistently and strong enough to protect us. I am comfortable with one core AP pack for all managed clients, with a separate exception lane for high-value, disputed, or unusual items. Same-day escalation is appropriate for anything that could materially affect cash timing or approval risk.", "type": "message", "subtype": null, "user_id": "persona_008", "channel_id": "C010", "created_at": "2026-04-09T18:31:10+00:00", "files_json": "[]", "reply_count": 1, "latest_reply": "1775759544.873434", "client_msg_id": null, "reactions_json": "[]", "attachments_json": "[]", "thread_parent_id": "c5ca7ce88b8e5377a09dfa0d7c4a4a75", "thread_ts_legacy": "1775759284.760318", "reply_users_count": 1, "is_activity_message": false}

{"id": "91883e89b7d0561eaa98983b75efffe0", "ts": "1775759544.873434", "text": "Let's document it as the default workflow for managed clients, then make the client-specific routing a controlled deviation rather than the norm. Please circulate a draft with the required fields, exception triggers, and ownership by end of day. If we keep it that tight, it should be much easier to enforce and explain to clients.", "type": "message", "subtype": null, "user_id": "persona_008", "channel_id": "C010", "created_at": "2026-04-09T18:32:24+00:00", "files_json": "[]", "reply_count": 1, "latest_reply": "1775759617.916896", "client_msg_id": null, "reactions_json": "[]", "attachments_json": "[]", "thread_parent_id": "f799658892cc5b6fa3f25348310e7535", "thread_ts_legacy": "1775759470.784155", "reply_users_count": 1, "is_activity_message": false}
